vocab.meaning: những năm tháng hình thành nhân cách (thời thơ ấu)
vocab.example: During my formative years, I was absolutely obsessed with collecting rare stamps from around the world.

vocab.meaning: phương thức giải tỏa sự sáng tạo
vocab.example: Finger painting served as a vital creative outlet for me when I was in kindergarten.

vocab.meaning: mê mải, chìm đắm vào cái gì đó
vocab.example: I would spend hours engrossed in building elaborate castles out of Lego bricks.

vocab.meaning: sự tò mò không bao giờ thỏa mãn/vô hạn
vocab.example: Driven by an insatiable curiosity about nature, I spent my youth catching insects in the backyard.

vocab.meaning: một hoạt động/sở thích làm một mình
vocab.example: Reading was a solitary pursuit that allowed me to escape into different worlds every night.

vocab.meaning: nuôi dưỡng cảm giác về điều gì đó
vocab.example: Learning the piano as a child helped foster a sense of discipline and patience.

vocab.meaning: ý thích bất chợt (không có kế hoạch trước)
vocab.example: I used to pick up new hobbies on a whim, moving from origami to coin collecting in just a few weeks.

vocab.meaning: sở thích nhất thời, mau chán
vocab.example: Most of my childhood hobbies were just passing fancies, but my love for drawing actually stuck with me.
Model airplane building required a high level of dexterity that I struggled to master as a kid.
Looking back at my childhood hobbies feels like revisiting a bygone era before smartphones took over everything.
